parameters.query:
SELECT 
    d.XCMD_0,
    d.XFACT_0,
    d.XMNT_0,
    d.XDATF_0,
    d.XNUM_0,
    grp.NB_DOUBLONS,
    grp.NUM_MIN
FROM BASE1.XDEPFACT d
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 
        XCMD_0,
        XFACT_0,
        XMNT_0,
        XDATF_0,
        COUNT(*)    AS NB_DOUBLONS,
        MIN(XNUM_0) AS NUM_MIN
    FROM BASE1.XDEPFACT
    GROUP BY XCMD_0, XFACT_0, XMNT_0, XDATF_0
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) grp
    ON  d.XCMD_0 = grp.XCMD_0
    AND d.XFACT_0 = grp.XFACT_0
    AND d.XMNT_0  = grp.XMNT_0
    AND d.XDATF_0 = grp.XDATF_0
WHERE d.XNUM_0 <> grp.NUM_MIN  
and d.XCMD_0<>'' and d.XFACT_0<>''
ORDER BY d.XCMD_0, d.XFACT_0, d.XNUM_0;
